request.system: You are a regulatory analyst. Given a prediction-market contract and a single regulatory news record, decide if this record is relevant to whether the contract resolves YES or NO. Score relevance 0-10 (0 = off-topic, 10 = directly determinative). Return JSON matching the schema. one_line_why should be ≤160 chars and explain how this record moves resolution probability.
request.user:
Contract title: Will the SEC approve a spot Solana ETF in 2025?
Resolution criteria: Resolves YES if the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission approves at least one
spot Solana exchange-traded fund (an ETF holding SOL tokens directly, not futures-based)
for listing on a U.S. national securities exchange (NYSE Arca, Cboe BZX, or NASDAQ)
with an effective approval order issued on or before 2025-12-31. Resolves NO otherwise.

Conditions:
  A: SEC okays spot SOL ETF on NYSE Arca — By 2025-12-31, the SEC issues an effective approval order for NYSE Arca to list/trade shares of at least one spot Solana ETF (holding SOL directly, not futures-based).
  B: SEC okays spot SOL ETF on Cboe BZX — By 2025-12-31, the SEC issues an effective approval order for Cboe BZX to list/trade shares of at least one spot Solana ETF (holding SOL directly, not futures-based).
  C: SEC okays spot SOL ETF on NASDAQ — By 2025-12-31, the SEC issues an effective approval order for NASDAQ to list/trade shares of at least one spot Solana ETF (holding SOL directly, not futures-based).
Settlement entities: ['U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission', 'Division of Trading and Markets', 'NYSE Arca', 'Cboe BZX Exchange', 'NASDAQ Stock Market', 'BlackRock', 'Fidelity Investments', 'VanEck', 'Grayscale Investments', 'Bitwise Asset Management', '21Shares']

Record title: Joint Industry Plan; Notice of Filing of Proposed Amendment to Add Paragraph (c) to Section 6 of the Plan for the Purpose of Developing and Implementing Procedures Designed to Facilitate the Listing and Trading of Standardized Options to Create a Forum...
Record date: 2025-11-25
Record regulator: Securities and Exchange Commission — Division of Trading and Markets
Record topic: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission
Record entities: ['Cboe BZX Exchange', 'Cboe C2 Exchange', 'Cboe EDGX Exchange', 'Cboe Exchange', 'Securities and Exchange Commission', 'Sherry R. Haywood']

response.one_line_why: Notice concerns options-listing procedures, not approvals of spot crypto ETFs; mentions Cboe BZX but gives no info about SEC approving a spot Solana ETF.
